assertion_results.text: Navigation is converted to a bottom-positioned tab bar with 5 or fewer primary items, not a hamburger menu or vertically stacked sidebar links
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 37-63: Uses a hamburger toggle with slide-down nav showing all 7 items. No bottom tab bar present anywhere in the output.

assertion_results.text: Output includes env(safe-area-inset-bottom) for bottom-positioned elements
assertion_results.evidence: No env(safe-area-inset-bottom) or env(safe-area-inset-*) appears anywhere in the file. No safe-area handling at all.

assertion_results.text: Output uses dvh (100dvh or min-h-[100dvh]) instead of 100vh for the main layout container
assertion_results.evidence: Line 35: min-h-[100dvh] on the outer flex container.

assertion_results.text: The transactions table is converted to a card or list layout for mobile, not left as a multi-column table
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 128-141: <ul> card list with md:hidden. Desktop table at lines 144-168 with hidden md:table.

assertion_results.text: The chart section includes a text headline or summary number alongside or above the chart visualization
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 108-118: Chart has only a title 'Monthly Revenue' and a ResponsiveContainer. No headline number, no text summary of the data.

assertion_results.text: Interactive elements have a minimum touch target size of 44px in at least one dimension
assertion_results.evidence: Hamburger button: w-10 h-10 = 40px (below 44px). Nav links: py-3 ≈ 42px (below 44px). View All button: text-sm with hover:underline, no explicit size. Card list items have no min-h.
